ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor type (foreign key to investor_types) */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding type (foreign key to holdings) */,
  "investor_since" TEXT /* Date the investor invested in the startup */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES investor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding type */,
  "holding_type" TEXT /* Type of holding percentage (e.g., Minority, Majority) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holding type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding round */,
  "round_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding round */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding raised in the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_funding_rounds" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor participating in the round */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor in the round */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the investor participated in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_funding_rounds_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_funding_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact information */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor the contact information belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the investor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, investor, startup) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_users" (
  "investor_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor-user relationship */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor in the relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_users_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_investor_info, edit_investor_info) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor the analytics belong to */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round the analytics belong to */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor in the round */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for the investor in the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_analytics_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_analytics_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication channel */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor the communication channel belongs to */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of communication channel (e.g., email, phone, physical address) */,
  "channel_value" TEXT /* Value of the communication channel (e.g., email address, phone number, physical address) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication channel record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication channel record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_channels_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)
